component.name: SFMC Data Loader
component.summary: Export and import Data Extension rows

description.p: SFMC Data Loader is a point-and-click desktop app for moving rows in and out of Salesforce Marketing Cloud Data Extensions — no command line, no IDE, and no Node.js installation required.

Connect a Marketing Cloud account, pick a Business Unit, and transfer data with a few clicks. It is built for marketers, admins, and consultants who want the power of the mcdata CLI in a friendly window with buttons, progress bars, and clear confirmations.

ul.li: Export Data Extension rows to CSV or TSV, from one Business Unit or several at once.
Import rows from a file into a Data Extension, within a BU or across BUs.
Streams multi-gigabyte Data Extensions straight to and from disk to stay memory-safe.
Guards destructive actions with explicit confirmations and optional pre-import backups.
Remembers connections locally so credentials are not re-entered every time.

screenshot.caption: Exporting Data Extension rows to a file
Importing rows into a Data Extension

description.p: First release with a branded application icon and Flathub metadata.
